'''samoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabb|sabb]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabb|sabb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| samoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæmeheth|sæmeheth]] || [[word:sæmehej|sæmehej]] || [[word:sæmehesh|sæmehesh]] || [[word:sæmehe|sæmehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:samomohoth|samomohoth]] || [[word:samomohoj|samomohoj]] || [[word:samomohosh|samomohosh]] || [[word:samomoho|samomoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:samohoth|samohoth]] || [[word:samohoj|samohoj]] || [[word:samohosh|samohosh]] || [[word:samoho|samoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:samofhoth|samofhoth]] || [[word:samofhoj|samofhoj]] || [[word:samofhosh|samofhosh]] || [[word:samofhof|samofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:samohotho|samohotho]] || [[word:samohojo|samohojo]] || [[word:samohosho|samohosho]] || [[word:samohoko|samohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:samohoth|samohoth]] || [[word:samohoj|samohoj]] || [[word:samohosh|samohosh]] || [[word:samoho|samoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:samohothol|samohothol]] || [[word:samohojol|samohojol]] || [[word:samohoshol|samohoshol]] || [[word:samohokol|samohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:samohothotho|samohothotho]] || [[word:samohojojo|samohojojo]] || [[word:samohoshosho|samohoshosho]] || [[word:samohoko|samohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:samohothon|samohothon]] || [[word:samohojon|samohojon]] || [[word:samohoshon|samohoshon]] || [[word:samohokon|samohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:samohothoro|samohothoro]] || [[word:samohojoro|samohojoro]] || [[word:samohoshoro|samohoshoro]] || [[word:samohokoro|samohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
